name: Railway DB Bot
description: Telegram bot that auto-provisions free PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB and Redis databases on Railway.app

ADMIN_ID.description: Your Telegram user ID (get it from @userinfobot)

LOG_CHANNEL_ID.description: Telegram channel ID for live logs (optional, leave blank to disable)

scripts.postdeploy: python3 -m playwright install chromium && python3 -m playwright install-deps chromium
